name: openclaw_llm_availability
description: Success rate of openclaw LLM calls. Ensures the LLM gateway is operational.

customSli.indicator:
fetch spans
| filter span.name == "openclaw.llm.call"
| filter service.name == "openclaw-gateway"
| summarize total = count(), good = countIf(span.status_code != "ERROR")
| fieldsAdd sli = (toDouble(good) / toDouble(total)) * 100
